label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21

extraction.one_line_summary: MOLANO Juan Sebastián won the Madrid sprint from distance after UAE lead-out collapsed, holding off PEDERSEN Mads in final 200m.
tactical_patterns: RODRÍGUEZ Carlos hunted intermediate sprint bonus seconds against ARENSMAN Thymen but failed to close overall podium gap.
JOHANSEN Julius and PLAPP Luke breakaway survived until flamme rouge on technical Madrid circuit despite modest gap.
UAE lead-out with OLIVEIRA Ivo disintegrated forcing MOLANO to finish his own sprint from 300m out.

rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastián: positive: abandoned planned lead-out role to sprint from distance and held off PEDERSEN, showing unexpected finishing speed
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: finished third despite perfect lead-out position, unable to come around his own pilot MOLANO
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: neutral: tactical awareness to hunt intermediate sprint bonuses but insufficient gap to threaten ARENSMAN's podium
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: survived in two-man break until final kilometer on technical circuit, showing composure in ceremonial stage
